seo.title: PublicSelf - Professional profile photos in minutes
seo.description: Upload a few selfies, choose a curated preset, and generate clean profile photos without waiting on a client-rendered landing page.

hero.title: Professional profile photos in minutes.
hero.description: Upload a few selfies, pick a curated preset, and generate polished profile images for LinkedIn, portfolios, and personal branding.
hero.trustNote: Download what you like. The marketing page is now fully rendered by the server, while the product experience stays in the app.
hero.imageAlt: A polished profile portrait created with PublicSelf
slogans: Advanced AI keeps your identity recognizable across every new look.
Move from a casual selfie to a profile-ready portrait quickly.
Reuse your best looks across headshots, three-quarter crops, and cleaner backgrounds.

featureCards.title: Curated presets
featureCards.body: Headshot and 3/4 framing, outfits, backgrounds, and lighting are already shaped for the outcome you want.

featureCards.title: Simple pricing
featureCards.body: Credits power generations and downloads, so you only pay for the results you actually keep.

featureCards.title: Ephemeral by default
featureCards.body: Download what you need when you like the result. Do not rely on long-term storage.

gallery.title: A landing page that shows real visual direction immediately
gallery.description: Instead of waiting for the browser to fetch homepage content, the first version ships with complete copy, structure, and examples in the HTML from the start.

items.title: Clean headshots
items.body: Professional framing for resumes, LinkedIn, and profile photos.

items.title: Sharper styling
items.body: Polished outfits, lighting, and backgrounds without building a full shoot from scratch.

items.title: Editorial variants
items.body: Use the same identity across stronger, more expressive visual directions.

items.title: Outdoor energy
items.body: Keep your face recognizable while changing the setting and tone.

items.title: Lifestyle looks
items.body: Test softer, more casual profile images when you want something less formal.

items.title: Consistent branding
items.body: Build a stronger public presence with images that still feel like you.

pricing.title: Simple credit packs
pricing.description: The first marketing version keeps pricing easy to understand and sends people into the existing app when they are ready to create an account.

plans.label: Starter
plans.name: PublicSelf Starter
plans.body: A smaller pack for trying headshots, comparing presets, and generating a first set of profile images.

plans.label: Studio
plans.name: PublicSelf Studio
plans.body: A larger pack for experimenting with more looks, more poses, and more download-ready results.

sections.title: Build your look from seed photos
sections.subtitle: Casual or formal - your choice
sections.body: Use two selfies to create a look. Go casual or formal, save the version you like, and reuse it when you want a stronger photoshoot result later.

sections.title: Your AI photoshoot
sections.subtitle: Pose, expression, background - and more
sections.body: Choose pose, facial expression, and background. Create profile-ready portraits, close-ups, and sharper social images without organizing a real studio session.

sections.title: Experiment and have fun
sections.subtitle: Not every credit is perfect - and that is okay
sections.body: This is a place to test different visual directions. Try new poses, looks, and framing until you find the version that feels most useful.

footer.title: The marketing site now handles the public page. The app still handles the tool.
footer.body: This split keeps the landing page easy to crawl and lets the product app keep its richer client-side flow without forcing a full migration.
footer.legalPrefix: By continuing you agree to our
